prompt:
Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity desktop SaaS admin console prototype image
Target dimensions: 1440 x 1024, no browser chrome, no device frame

Create a realistic production-quality UI mockup for the SuperTeam Web console page: “数字员工能力总览”. This prototype must correct the earlier missing capability model and should be grounded in Paperclip-style Agent configuration concepts while preserving SuperTeam boundaries.

Product context:
SuperTeam is an enterprise control plane for digital employees, projects, workflows, approvals, runtime execution, artifacts, context, audit, and external capabilities. Digital Employee is a Control Plane business identity. Runtime Agent is only the execution management plane. Provider is Claude Code, OpenCode, Codex, PI, etc. Each digital employee has one execution instance. Project owner / human owner belongs to Project Management, not the general digital employee list.

Paperclip reference concepts to adapt, not copy:
- Agent has instructionsBundle with entry file AGENTS.md.
- Agent has desiredSkills and a skill sync snapshot: installed/configured/missing/stale/external.
- Agent has adapter/provider config and runtime config/model profile.
- Agent exposes capabilities, budget/status/run facts.

SuperTeam information model to show:
- AGENTS.md instruction bundle: managed/external, entry file, version, sync status.
- Skills: team inherited + employee override, desired/installed/missing/stale/external states.
- MCP: bound MCP servers, tool count, health, authorization scope.
- Provider / Runtime: execution instance, runtime node, provider type, model profile, heartbeat.
- Governance snapshot: context policy, allowed actions, forbidden actions, output contract, risk level.
- Creator: the human employee who created this digital employee. Use column label 创建者. Do not use 负责人 or 人类归属人 in the main list.

Style:
Use SuperTeam's existing visual language: near-white / pale cyan liquid glass enterprise console, shadcn-admin style, compact high-density admin layout, teal primary #2CC7AA, subtle borders, soft shadows, semantic status colors, lucide-style line icons. No dark sidebar, no marketing hero, no decorative blobs or orbs, radius 8px or less.

Layout:
- Left sidebar width about 240px, white glass background, SuperTeam logo. Active nav item “数字员工”. Sidebar groups include 工作台, 任务中心, 数字员工, 技能管理, 项目管理, 团队管理, 流程编排, 外部能力, 协作集成, 审批中心, Runtime 节点, 权限中心, 用户管理, 审计日志.
- Top bar with global search placeholder “搜索员工、项目、团队、能力、运行等”, team selector “运维团队（ops）”, notification icon, user avatar.
- Main header with bot icon tile, title “数字员工”, subtitle “身份、AGENTS.md、Skills、MCP、执行实例与治理快照”, primary button “创建数字员工”.
- KPI strip as one grouped panel: 全部员工 18, AGENTS.md 已配置 16, Skills 异常 2, MCP 降级 1, Runtime 未同步 2, 高风险 1.
- Toolbar: search input “搜索数字员工”, filters “员工类型”, “团队”, “能力健康”, “Provider”, “风险”.
- Main table headers exactly: 数字员工, 类型, 团队, AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP, Provider / Runtime, 治理快照, 最近运行, 创建者, 操作.
- Example rows:
  数据库运维员工 / ops-db-bot, 执行员工, AGENTS.md v7 已同步, Skills 8 已安装 1 缺失, MCP postgres/prometheus healthy, claude-code · ops-node-01, context v7, 今天 09:32, 王一.
  项目协调员-运维改造 / ops-project-coordinator, 项目协调员, AGENTS.md managed, Skills 5 configured, MCP jira/feishu healthy, codex · ops-node-02, output contract v3, 运行中, 李娜.
  发布检查员工, 回归测试员工, 监控巡检员工.
- Use compact status pills: 已同步, 未配置, 缺失, stale, healthy, degraded, ready, active.
- Right rail panels:
  1. “能力异常” listing missing skill, MCP degraded, AGENTS.md external path warning.
  2. “能力来源” showing 团队继承, 员工覆盖, Runtime 上报, 项目关联只读.
  3. “快速操作” buttons: 同步 AGENTS.md, 同步 Skills, 检查 MCP, 预览生效配置.

Visual requirements:
Enterprise control console, high density but readable. Avoid nested cards. Use dividers, table rows, badges, small icon tiles. Text must not overlap or clip. Chinese labels must be legible, especially AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP, Provider / Runtime, 治理快照, 创建者.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity desktop SaaS admin console prototype image
Target dimensions: 1440 x 1024, no browser chrome, no device frame

Create a realistic production-quality UI mockup for SuperTeam Web console: “数字员工详情 - 能力配置”. It should adapt Paperclip Agent detail structure to SuperTeam: Dashboard / AGENTS.md / Skills / MCP / Configuration / Runs, but keep SuperTeam language and boundaries.

Product context:
Digital Employee is a business identity in Control Plane. Runtime Agent manages execution. Provider is the engine. Project responsibility belongs to Project Management. This page is for the digital employee's own instruction bundle, skills, MCP tools, execution instance, governance snapshot, and run readiness.

Main subject:
Digital employee “数据库运维员工” / ops-db-bot. Type: 执行员工. Team: 运维团队. Creator: 王一. Runtime: ops-node-01. Provider: claude-code. Status: active.

Critical content to include:
- Header: title 数据库运维员工, badges 执行员工, 活跃中, 中风险, claude-code, ops-node-01. Summary fields: 创建者 王一, 团队 运维团队, 治理版本 v7, 执行实例 ready, 最近同步 今天 09:32. Do NOT show 负责人 or 人类归属人 as a top-level employee field.
- Tab bar with labels: 概览, AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP, 配置, 运行.
- Active tab: AGENTS.md / Skills / MCP combined capability view.

Layout:
- Full SuperTeam shell: left sidebar active 数字员工, top search/team/user.
- Main body three-column or two-column dense layout.
- Left large panel: “AGENTS.md 指令包” with managed/external segmented control, entry file AGENTS.md, version v7, path /runtime/ops-node-01/employees/ops-db-bot/AGENTS.md, last sync success. Include a code-editor-like preview with readable headings: 角色边界, 禁止动作, 输出契约, 证据要求. Do not show long prose; show editor lines and minimap feeling.
- Middle panel: “Skills 同步” list with sections inherited from team and employee overrides. Rows: postgres-diagnose installed, slow-query-analysis installed, release-check configured, report-writer installed, risky-write-guard required, legacy-cache-skill missing. Use state pills installed/configured/missing/stale/external and origins 团队继承, 员工覆盖, required.
- Right panel top: “MCP 工具面” showing MCP servers: postgres-mcp healthy 12 tools, prometheus healthy 8 tools, jira degraded 4 tools, feishu healthy 6 tools. Include auth scope chips read-only, audit, approval required.
- Right panel middle: “Provider / Runtime” showing runtime node, provider, model profile, supports resume/stop/structured output, heartbeat.
- Bottom strip: “运行前检查” with checks AGENTS.md synced, skills synced, MCP degraded warning, provider healthy, governance snapshot current. Button “预览生效配置” and “同步到 Runtime”.

Style:
Near-white / pale cyan liquid glass enterprise console, shadcn-admin style, compact admin interface, subtle borders, teal primary, semantic green/amber/red/blue, lucide-style icons, radius <= 8px. No marketing layout, no decorative blobs/orbs, no dark sidebar. Text must not overlap or clip. Chinese UI labels must be clear and readable.

Use case: ui-mockup
Asset type: high-fidelity desktop SaaS admin console prototype image
Target dimensions: 1440 x 1024, no browser chrome, no device frame

Create a realistic production-quality UI mockup for SuperTeam Web console: “创建数字员工 - 能力配置向导”. It should include AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP, Provider/Runtime and governance preview as first-class steps.

Product context:
SuperTeam creates Digital Employees as Control Plane business identities. Creating a digital employee should select team, role, creator, AGENTS.md instruction bundle, skills, MCP servers, Runtime Agent, Provider, model profile, and governance snapshot. Runtime provisioning writes AGENTS.md, skills, and MCP config into the employee execution directory. Project owner / human owner is not configured here; project responsibility belongs to Project Management.

Screen concept:
Creation wizard with active step “能力配置”.

Layout:
- Full SuperTeam shell, left sidebar active 数字员工, top global search/team/user.
- Header breadcrumb “数字员工 / 创建”, title “创建数字员工”, subtitle “配置身份、AGENTS.md、Skills、MCP、Provider 与治理快照”, action buttons 保存草稿, 预览生效配置, 创建并预置 Runtime.
- Horizontal stepper: 1 基础身份, 2 AGENTS.md, 3 Skills / MCP, 4 Runtime / Provider, 5 治理预览. Step 3 active.
- Upper summary strip: 名称 数据库运维员工, 类型 执行员工, 团队 运维团队, 创建者 当前登录员工 王一, 风险 中, 状态 草稿. No 负责人 or 人类归属人.
- Main grid:
  Left panel “AGENTS.md 指令包” with options managed/external, entry AGENTS.md, template 运维执行员工模板, version draft-v1, preview button.
  Center large panel “Skills 选择” with searchable library and selected list. Include inherited team skills and employee override toggles. Rows: postgres-diagnose, slow-query-analysis, prometheus-query, report-writer, risky-write-guard required, cache-inspection optional. Show states selected, inherited, required, missing dependency.
  Right panel “MCP Server 绑定” showing postgres-mcp, prometheus-mcp, jira-mcp, feishu-mcp with tool counts and auth scopes. Include status healthy/degraded and approval-required tags.
  Lower panel “Runtime / Provider” with Runtime node selector ops-node-01, Provider claude-code, model profile default/high-reasoning, workspace path masked, preflight checks.
  Right lower panel “治理预览” listing context policy, allowed actions, forbidden actions, output contract, approval policy, validation: 阻断错误 0, 需确认 2.
- Footer sticky bar with audit summary: 创建者 王一, AGENTS.md draft-v1, Skills 6 selected, MCP 4 bound, Runtime preflight pass. Primary button “创建并预置”.

Style:
SuperTeam near-white/pale cyan liquid glass enterprise console, shadcn-admin style, compact high-density form workflow, teal primary #2CC7AA, semantic colors, lucide-style icons, radius <= 8px, subtle borders. Avoid nested cards, marketing hero, dark sidebar, decorative blobs/orbs. Text must be readable and not clipped. Chinese labels must be clear, especially AGENTS.md, Skills, MCP, Runtime / Provider, 治理预览, 创建者.
